source_jobs.description: <p>We’re always looking for great talent. Even if a role isn’t listed right now, submitting your information ensures you’re considered for upcoming opportunities. Join our talent community and stay connected!</p>

notes: Brand New School is a design and strategy firm with a strong focus on visual identity and storytelling. The job postings suggest a company with a creative and design-oriented culture.
